pipeline_status.poller: QUIET — No changes since 2026-04-08T22:00Z. V51.1 stable (94.5% accuracy, 69 WINs). Standing watch items: WIN-068/069 not yet in our wins.json; AI infrastructure not yet documented.
pipeline_status.analyst: WIN-066 globe fingerprint analyzed (CERES measurement framework dependency, hemisphere area ratio on disc, no dome radiation budget exists). EXP-031/032/033/034 still pending (human required). Pipeline bug found: orphan check used i.issue_id instead of i.id — FIXED in analyst.md this run.
pipeline_status.curmudgeon: Cycle 2 Phase 1: 63/67 WINs reviewed. Last: WIN-063 (Std Model Explains confirmed). Next: WIN-064 (P-wave shadow zone). Holistic Phase 2 checks all pending.
pipeline_status.integrity: WARN (minor) — 2074 tests pass. Duplicate id=dielectric ALREADY RESOLVED in prior run. geodesy.noaa.gov timeout: transient, monitoring. No structural issues.

external_changes.dome_site_changes: No new changes since V51.1 (2026-04-08). Previous standing watch items: WIN-068/069 coverage gap, AI infrastructure (llms.txt, evidence_graph, claim_index), accuracy 94.5%, sun altitude split.

internal_issues.description: Accuracy figure 95.2% needed update to 94.5% (V51.1). 8 patches across part1, part2b, part4, part6 (intro, 6.6 header, 6.6 body, denominator paragraph), part8.

WIN-061: Dome acknowledged W027 falsification in V51.1. Added V51.1 update paragraph crediting honest falsification, then showing PRED-SR-SUPPRESS is post-hoc retrodiction of known ionospheric physics.
Kim et al. 2021 citation — DOI verified correct, paper verified correct, mass figure risk low per investigation notes.
internal_issues.fix_details: Closed as wontfix: DOI 10.3847/1538-4357/ac294f confirmed as Kim et al. 2021 ApJ 923, 101. Paper is about El Gordo cluster. Our argument does not hinge on specific mass value.

internal_issues.description: WIN-063 Cycle 2: Aubert et al. (2013) may not address hemispheric asymmetry specifically. Added Olson & Deguen (2012, doi:10.1038/ngeo1506) as more targeted citation. Reframed data-constrained caveat.
WIN-063 Cycle 2: WIN-005 re-slicing argument missing. Added explicit note that WIN-063 repackages WIN-005 observation as ratio metric — same pattern as WIN-041/042 (Misleading).

internal_issues.rationale_for_deferral: Requires human editorial decision on verdict taxonomy restructuring.

infrastructure_fixes.description: Fixed orphan check bug in monitor/prompts/analyst.md: changed i.issue_id to i.id in the orphan detection query. This was causing ISS-641/642 to appear orphaned when they were tracked.
